title: OpenAI Kills $100 Billion of Google's Value!
description:
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fulldisclosure.ig/

The AI War just got real! OpenAI launched ChatGPT Atlas, its first-ever AI-powered web browser, directly challenging Google Chrome. The result? Google’s stock plummeted, wiping out roughly $100 billion in market value in a single day. Investors are panicking because Atlas turns the chatbot into a direct search competitor, aiming at Google’s core digital ad revenue. The battle for the future of the internet is officially on. Is this the beginning of the end for Google Search?
